query:
UPDATE users SET onboardingComplete = false, onboardingStage = 1 WHERE id = (SELECT u.id FROM (SELECT id FROM users LIMIT 1) u);
UPDATE user_onboarding SET completed = false, completedAt = NULL WHERE userId = (SELECT u.id FROM (SELECT id FROM users LIMIT 1) u);
